scenario.context: Station 08 of the day flow: Review and reflect on lessons and operational work.
scenario.mission: You close the day flow with target-vs-actual review, lessons learned and a concrete follow-up plan.

customerRequest.subject: Station 08: LF01 final reflection
customerRequest.body: Please create a short reflection to close the day flow: goal achievement, open items, lessons learned and next development steps.

questions.title: Start target-vs-actual properly
questions.prompt: What is the best start for a final reflection?

options.text: Compare goals and achieved results in a structured way
List only the most difficult tasks

feedback.correct: Correct: target-vs-actual comparison is the solid basis.
feedback.wrong: Not appropriate: reflection needs goal reference and facts.

questions.title: Derive lessons learned
questions.prompt: Which statements help create robust lessons learned? (Multiple selection)

options.text: Clearly name cause and effect of a problem
Assign improvements with owner and date
Leave critical points out out of consideration
Document positive patterns for follow-up tasks

feedback.correct: Correct: the lessons learned are set up for implementation.
feedback.wrong: Partially wrong: please secure cause reference and accountability more strongly.

questions.title: LF01 closing process
questions.prompt: Order the sequence for a professional LF01 closure.

feedback.correct: Correct: this is a clear closing process.
feedback.wrong: Not optimal: please put analysis and prioritization before communication.

questions.title: LF01 completion rate
questions.prompt: Out of 18 planned learning goals, 15 were achieved. What is the completion rate in percent (rounded)?

feedback.wrong: Please calculate the share of achieved goals correctly.

questions.title: Closing note for the trainer
questions.prompt: Formulate a closing note (4-6 sentences) with goal achievement, open risk and next development step.
questions.expectedOutline: Clear closure with goal status, residual risk and binding follow-up action.

feedback.correct: Correct: the note is directly usable for the training discussion.
feedback.wrong: Please describe goal achievement, risk and next step more explicitly.
